servers.description: Enables real-time search across Google, News, Reddit, YouTube, and Amazon using Scavio's unified API, with secure key injection for Arcade agents.

SCAVIO_API_KEY.description: Your Scavio API key, get one at https://dashboard.scavio.dev

servers.name: arcade-scavio

servers.description: Enables a side-panel companion that watches your coding session and provides context-aware answers about your codebase and session state through a small, token-cheap MCP interface.

TOSHI_REPO.description: Absolute path to the repository (defaults to current working directory)

CODEBASE_MEMORY_BIN.description: Absolute path to codebase-memory-mcp binary (defaults to PATH)

servers.name: toshi-mcp
